stem: Find the perimeter of a rectangle with length $8$ cm and width $5$ cm.
explanation:
A rectangle has two pairs of equal sides:
$$P = 2(l + w) = 2(8 + 5) = 2 \times 13 = 26 \text{ cm}$$

stem: Find the perimeter of a square with side length $9$ m.
hint: A square has 4 equal sides. Use $P = 4s$.
explanation:
All four sides are equal:
$$P = 4s = 4 \times 9 = 36 \text{ m}$$

stem: A triangle has sides measuring $6$ cm, $8$ cm and $10$ cm. Find its perimeter.
A regular hexagon has a side length of $5$ cm. Find its perimeter.
hint: A regular hexagon has 6 equal sides.
explanation:
A regular hexagon has 6 equal sides:
$$P = 6 \times 5 = 30 \text{ cm}$$

stem: A composite L-shaped figure has sides measuring $10$ m, $5$ m, $4$ m, $3$ m, $6$ m and $2$ m. Find its perimeter.
hint: For a composite shape, add all the side lengths around the outside.
explanation:
Add all six side lengths:
$$P = 10 + 5 + 4 + 3 + 6 + 2 = 30 \text{ m}$$

stem: A composite figure has sides measuring $12$ cm, $7$ cm, $5$ cm, $3$ cm, $7$ cm and $4$ cm. Find its perimeter.
hint: Add all the side lengths around the outside of the shape.
explanation:
Add all six side lengths:
$$P = 12 + 7 + 5 + 3 + 7 + 4 = 38 \text{ cm}$$

stem: A composite L-shaped figure has sides measuring $8$ m, $5$ m, $3$ m, $3$ m, $5$ m and $2$ m. Find its perimeter.
hint: Add all six side lengths around the outside.
explanation:
Add all six side lengths:
$$P = 8 + 5 + 3 + 3 + 5 + 2 = 26 \text{ m}$$

stem: A composite figure has sides measuring $14$ cm, $8$ cm, $6$ cm, $4$ cm, $8$ cm and $4$ cm. Find its perimeter.
hint: Add all six side lengths around the outside.
explanation:
Add all six side lengths:
$$P = 14 + 8 + 6 + 4 + 8 + 4 = 44 \text{ cm}$$

stem: The perimeter of a rectangle is $28$ cm and its width is $6$ cm. Find the length.
explanation:
Substitute into the perimeter formula:
$$28 = 2(l + 6)$$
$$14 = l + 6$$
$$l = 8 \text{ cm}$$

stem: A regular octagon has a perimeter of $56$ m. Find the length of one side.
hint: A regular octagon has 8 equal sides.
explanation:
A regular octagon has 8 equal sides, so:
$$s = \frac{56}{8} = 7 \text{ m}$$

stem: A triangle has a perimeter of $40$ cm. Two of its sides measure $15$ cm and $13$ cm. Find the length of the third side.
hint: Subtract the two known sides from the perimeter.
explanation:
The third side equals the perimeter minus the two known sides:
$$s = 40 - 15 - 13 = 12 \text{ cm}$$

stem: A rectangle has a perimeter of $46$ m. Its length is $7$ m more than its width. Find the width.
hint: Let the width be $w$. Then the length is $w + 7$. Write an equation using $P = 2(l + w)$.
